name: Thames Valley Athletics Centre Track
metaTitle: Thames Valley Athletics Centre (TVAC) | Track Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for the Thames Valley Athletics Centre (TVAC) in Eton.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Mon–Fri 06:30–21:45, Sat–Sun 09:00–18:00. Bank Holidays 09:00–15:00. Please check with the centre for event closures.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access is available via membership or pay-as-you-go sessions. Contact the centre for current track-specific pricing.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A premier 8-lane 400m outdoor track. The facility also features an indoor 60m sprint straight and indoor field event areas.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Parking is included for track users. IMPORTANT: You must register your vehicle registration at reception or via the RingGo app to avoid a fine.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Datchet & Eton Leisure website for facility details and membership options.
